title: FEN - Fabtech Engineering
content:
Fabtech Engineering is a part of Fabtech Group rapidly establishing its name for world class fabrication facility in the MENA region, catering to the needs in the various sectors of Oil & Gas, Power, Water, Food, Chemical, Cement and Marine Industries. Established in 2010 based on the vision of its founder Dr. Harry Moraes with Heavy Engineering facility to serve the major Engineering sectors.
We are committed to customer satisfaction through continuous training, development and implementing new technology thereby going one step ahead of the market and competition.
We believe in growth with a commitment to Quality, Health, Environment and Safety along with Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) through various initiatives.
We execute all kind of the fabrication work including:
